local_setup_divergence.notes: Docs-only draft published through connected GitHub app after local gh credential sandbox failure. No local-only runtime/tooling behavior shaped this product contract.

roadmap_reconciliation.notes: Tool-Agnostic cross-repository operational hygiene; Factory PR #290 is the shared draft.

state_refinement.release_state: Documentation-only release-control contract. No product lifecycle behavior, canonical state, authority, persistence, routing, ingestion, or review flow changed.
states_deferred: Manifest registry, provenance emitters, topology runners, promotion controller, and production identity verification.
invariants: No canonical product state, authority, or persistence semantics changed.
Release manifests and topology receipts remain operational evidence, not Decision Ledger, signoff, compliance, or product authority.
The product repository remains authoritative for its own runtime/artifact interfaces.

rejected_or_collapsed_states: No new product lifecycle state; release-control terms remain docs and future operational records.
minimization_review.rationale: The PR records only repo-local adoption and defers executable release-control state until Factory review.

end_of_session_capture.notes: Receipt reuse must be keyed to complete interface/artifact/configuration closure, never paths or issue closure.

factory_signals.artifact_boundary: Only a repo-local adoption document and this attestation are added; no prompts, scratch logs, credentials, fixtures, or runtime artifacts.
factory_signals.domain_entity_candidates: Release Manifest and journey closure are product-release delivery terms governed by Factory PR #290; no product glossary promotion claimed.
factory_signals.factory_learning_signals: Independent closures allow Integration-to-Bot-to-MCP validation without Bot-to-Cloud rerun when the hosted closure is unchanged; unknown edges invalidate reuse.
factory_signals.minimum_product_validation: Documentation review only. No CI gate, runner, or production deployment behavior is claimed implemented.
